posts.author: TamaraAdler (Tamara )
posts.cookedHtml:
Join us for Azure DevOps & monday.com Integration Webinar

When & where - Tuesday, January 13th | 06:00 PM IDT / 11:00 AM EST | Microsoft Teams

Sync Work Items. Automate Updates. Deliver Faster.

Looking to optimize work and bridge the gap between technology and business? This Webinar is for you.

Looking to streamline your delivery process and close the gap between development and business?
Join us for an exclusive KPMG webinar to see how integrating monday.com with Microsoft Azure DevOps brings full visibility and control to your software delivery lifecycle.

Discover how to:

  • Sync work items and user stories between Azure DevOps and monday.com in real time

  • Align dev and business teams with shared visibility into priorities, sprints, and progress

  • Automate status updates and reduce manual reporting across tools

  • Improve collaboration and delivery speed without changing how your team’s work

Who should attend?
Developers, DevOps engineers, project managers, product managers, QA, and any team that needs smoother alignment between business goals and technical execution.

Click here to register
